headline: A Look At Bank Of America (BAC) Valuation As Recent Returns Send Mixed Signals
summary: Bank of America stock at a glance Bank of America (BAC) is drawing attention after recent trading left the share price at US$47.16, with returns showing mixed signals over the past month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Bank of America. The recent 1 day and 7 day share price gains sit against a weaker 30 day and year to date share price return, while longer term total shareholder returns over 1, 3 and 5 years remain positive. This suggests momentum has cooled recently...
